title: Recycler Block
description: Adds a new block called 'Recycler', which can recycle the item u put inside it and turn it into something more useful
body:
This mod adds a new block called 'Recycler' to the game which can recycle the item u put inside it and turn it into something more useful.

![Recycler Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b86b417aba1d2991f894195a8b02fa8d4fd0f2ae_0.webp)

## Crafting Recipe
2 Redstone Dust, 1 piston, 1 hopper and 5 iron ingots.

![Crafting Reciped](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1af62e4e0ed36504c467dcb3e11689dfa1e6c80.png)
